entries.description: Refactored fetchFplData to perform robust squad reconstruction for accurate Loyalty and MVP calculation. Removed fallback to mock data to ensure only accurate data is displayed or an error is thrown.
Removed the fallback to mock data in the catch block. The app now strictly displays the error if data fetching fails, ensuring the user is not misled by accurate-looking but fake data.
